AccountNode.description: Chart of accounts node with recursive children

expiresAt.description: Optional expiry timestamp for CREDIT_LIMIT_OVERRIDE_REQUEST approvals.

reason.description: Decision reason. Required and nonblank for CREDIT_REQUEST, CREDIT_LIMIT_OVERRIDE_REQUEST, and PERIOD_CLOSE_REQUEST. Optional for EXPORT_REQUEST and ignored for PAYROLL_RUN approve.

dealerId.description: Dealer identity for headroom evaluation; required when neither salesOrderId nor packagingSlipId can resolve the dealer

dispatchAmount.description: Legacy alias of requestedAmount; retained for compatibility

requestedAmount.description: Canonical requested amount for temporary credit headroom. Required headroom is computed against outstanding + pending-order exposure

currentExposure.description: Dealer credit exposure snapshot at request time (outstanding ledger balance + pending-order exposure)

dispatchAmount.description: Legacy alias of requestedAmount maintained for compatibility

requestedAmount.description: Canonical requested amount approved for temporary headroom

requiredHeadroom.description: Temporary headroom required for approval under canonical order credit posture (outstanding + pending + requestedAmount - creditLimit)

dealerId.description: Dealer id (required for admin/sales callers; ignored for dealer callers)

closeResidualWastage.description: Set true to close the remaining mixed quantity as canonical process loss on this packing request.

unappliedAmountApplication.description: Header-level unapplied amount handling. DOCUMENT is only valid on explicit allocation rows.

roles.description: Optional full role set; omit to keep existing role assignments

items.description: Optional full role set; omit to keep existing role assignments

info.description: Core APIs for the scoped-account multi-tenant ERP platform
info.title: BigBright ERP Domain API

post.description: Origin-specific rules: CREDIT_REQUEST, CREDIT_LIMIT_OVERRIDE_REQUEST, and PERIOD_CLOSE_REQUEST require a nonblank reason. PAYROLL_RUN supports only APPROVE.

parameters.description: Approval origin type: EXPORT_REQUEST, CREDIT_REQUEST, CREDIT_LIMIT_OVERRIDE_REQUEST, PAYROLL_RUN, PERIOD_CLOSE_REQUEST
parameters.name: originType

post.description: Explicitly places the dealer into ON_HOLD status and reports whether the hold was newly applied.

200.description: Dealer is now on hold or was already on hold

201.description: Order created for draft-lifecycle requests with paymentTerms/finishedGoodId

422.description: Credit limit exceeded and no approved override covers required headroom
